# Trading P&L Tracker - Project Setup Complete

## Project Overview
A React-based web application for tracking daily trading profit/loss with multiple sessions, analytics, charts, and monthly profit calculations.

## Tech Stack
- Frontend: React 18+ with Vite
- Styling: Tailwind CSS (via CDN)
- Charts: Recharts
- Storage: Browser Local Storage
- Build: Vite

## Completed Steps

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
  - Trading P&L tracker with daily sessions, charts, analytics, and monthly calculations
  - React with local storage
  - Key features: multiple sessions, charts, win rate, statistics, monthly targets

- [x] Scaffold the Project
  - Created React + Vite project structure
  - Configured Tailwind CSS via CDN

- [x] Customize the Project
  - Built TradingContext.jsx for state management
  - Created 5 main components:
    - Header.jsx (branding and navigation)
    - DailyTracker.jsx (session input/tracking)
    - Charts.jsx (Recharts visualizations)
    - Statistics.jsx (performance metrics)
    - Settings.jsx (configuration and data export)
  - Implemented all calculations (win rate, profit factor, average win/loss, etc.)

- [x] Install Required Extensions
  - Recharts for charts
  - Lucide React for icons

- [x] Compile the Project
  - Fixed Tailwind CSS configuration
  - All dependencies installed successfully

- [x] Create and Run Task
  - Development server running on http://localhost:5173

- [x] Launch the Project
  - App successfully running and tested with sample data

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
  - README.md created with full documentation

## Features Implemented

✅ Daily session tracking (multiple per day)
✅ Real-time P&L calculation
✅ Monthly target tracking with progress bar
✅ Win rate calculation
✅ Performance statistics (avg win/loss, profit factor, largest win/loss)
✅ Monthly trend charts (line chart)
✅ Daily P&L charts (bar chart)
✅ Data persistence with local storage
✅ Settings tab with monthly target adjustment
✅ Export data as JSON
✅ Responsive dark-mode UI

## How to Run

1. Navigate to project: `cd "trading calculator"`
2. Start dev server: `npm run dev`
3. Open browser to: `http://localhost:5173`

## Project Status
✅ **COMPLETE AND FULLY FUNCTIONAL**

The Trading P&L Tracker is ready for use!
